opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My throat is burning, my neck glands are huge, and I'm too weak to even lift my head off the pillow.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: My throat has flared badly and it hurts so much to swallow I can barely drink; my parent is helping me.

symptom_narrative.onset: over the last 24 hours after a stressful day
symptom_narrative.character: burning sore throat, big tender neck glands, crushing fatigue
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: swallowing is agony and I'm exhausted
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: throat and both sides of my neck
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: a recurrent flare like my glandular fever
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: can't chew food, struggling to drink, whispering to save energy
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I had glandular fever and get these recurrent sore-throat crashes with my ME/CFS

family_history_as_reported.narrative: nothing relevant that I know of

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: my parent is caring for me and helping me drink

objective_data_offered.value: parent says both sides of the throat look a bit red, no big one-sided swelling seen, voice sounds normal
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: informal look with a phone light, not a clinical throat exam

objective_data_offered.value: I can still swallow my saliva, just very painfully
